demographics.living_situation: lives alone in her own home; a neighbour helps out and is present today

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My legs have completely lost all their power; I can't even push myself up out of this chair anymore. I went down earlier when they just gave way, and now I'm stuck.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: She had a fall this morning when her legs gave out and now she cannot get up out of the armchair at all — her neighbour rang because she is stranded and they can't lift her safely.

symptom_narrative.onset: the weakness has crept up over about the past year; today it got to the point where she couldn't stand at all
symptom_narrative.duration: gradual over a year, with an abrupt loss of function today
symptom_narrative.character: her legs feel heavy and powerless, and her grip is weak — she says walking feels like 'wading through mud'
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: she says the power in her legs has completely gone — she cannot push up out of the chair even with both arms
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: mostly the tops of the legs and the shoulders/arms; her hands feel weak too
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: steadily getting worse over months, then a sudden inability to stand today after the fall
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing she has tried; she needs someone to physically help her
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to stand from the low armchair, and being tired
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: very tired all the time, poor stamina, struggles to open jars or hold her walking frame securely; poor appetite
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: she has been getting slower and weaker for a while but has not been completely unable to stand before today
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: cannot rise from the chair or transfer without maximal help; housebound and now stranded

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: high blood pressure, takes tablets for it

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: mostly tea and toast; doesn't eat much and doesn't do any regular exercise
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; a neighbour checks in and is the main support; home has no grab rails and the armchair is very low

objective_data_offered.value: looks very thin and frail, sitting slumped low in an armchair, unable to push herself up even using both arms
neighbour says she went down onto the floor this morning when her legs gave way, did not hit her head, and they could not get her back up — they moved her to the armchair
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: second-hand account from a neighbour, not a clinical assessment

objective_data_offered.value: neighbour says she has been eating almost nothing but tea and toast and has lost weight over the last several months
around 55 kg on the bathroom scales, down from before
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: home scales, approximate, read out by the neighbour

objective_data_offered.value: she says she is not in any bad pain in her hip or groin, just weak and a bit sore from sitting so long
